expectations.text: Agent checked hunger/thirst status (e.g. via score) before taking action
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'I connected to the MUD as dummy and checked your status with score. Found: You were both hungry and thirsty...'

expectations.text: Agent took a corrective action appropriate to what was found, or explicitly reports no action needed
expectations.evidence: summary.md: drank from a free public fountain to clear thirst, sold a spare unequipped sword for gold, bought and ate bread at the Bakery to clear hunger; final score showed no warnings

expectations.text: No lingering connection to the MUD server (port 4000) or stray background process after the task finishes
expectations.evidence: Verified independently: `ss -tn | grep :4000` empty, no mud_client.py process; agent's own status check confirmed disconnected

notes: Character actually was hungry/thirsty with low HP (4/23) at the start of this run (inherited from the baseline near-death encounter in eval 2); resolved via free fountain water plus selling a spare item to afford bread, rather than assuming gold was available.
